LanguageData.VFEE_Parade_Behavior.roles.0.label: vice president
LanguageData.ThroneSpeech.letterText: {ORGANIZER_labelShort} is giving a presidential address from the presidential chair. \nIf all goes well, listeners will feel inspired, and gain respect for {ORGANIZER_labelShort}. If it goes poorly, the address will do social damage. The outcome depends on {ORGANIZER_labelShort}'s social abilities.
